ns1:revision.ns1:comment: Created page with "== Attendance == * Microsoft: Xiaolin Zang, Cyrus Ramavarapu * OpenSFS Board: Tom Crowe == Minutes == * Cyrus: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-536 Lustre Wiki: Review Old/Obscure Tool or System Integration Pages] - Draft of the virtualization (started a few weeks ago) * Xiaolin: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-537 Lustre Wiki: Review Robinhood Policy Engine Page] - Completed: No change since last meeting. * Tom: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUD..."
ns1:revision.ns1:text:
== Attendance ==
* Microsoft: Xiaolin Zang, Cyrus Ramavarapu * OpenSFS Board: Tom Crowe
== Minutes ==
* Cyrus: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-536 Lustre Wiki: Review Old/Obscure Tool or System Integration Pages] - Draft of the virtualization (started a few weeks ago) * Xiaolin: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-537 Lustre Wiki: Review Robinhood Policy Engine Page] - Completed: No change since last meeting. * Tom: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-538 Lustre Wiki: Review Lustre Quotas and OST Pools] - No updates -- lustre quota page has been revamped. Has not started on the pools page. Would appreciate feed back if possible.
[[Category:DWG]]
